Name: FAnimNode_ObserveBone
Description: Debugging node that displays the current value of a bone in a specific space.

Variables.Name: DisplaySpace
Variables.Description: Reference frame to display the bone transform in.

Variables.Name: bRelativeToRefPose
Variables.Description: Show the difference from the reference pose?

Variables.Name: Translation
Variables.Description: Translation of the bone being observed.

Variables.Name: Rotation
Variables.Description: Rotation of the bone being observed.

Variables.Name: Scale
Variables.Description: Scale of the bone being observed.
